LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 04, MOTION TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION, CALENDAR OF DEC-07-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER ARBITRATION CONTINUED TO 1/10/96. AWARD IS TO BE FILED NO LATER THAN 1/23/96. STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO 3/13/96. (SEE SEPARATE STAT. CONF. ORDER) ORDER FILED.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-09-1996, CONTINUED TO MAR-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ARBITRATION RESULTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAOSAVA, LEANO NIUMELELEGA, LEGA SEFO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. $19,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,750.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFFS: $18,000.00 TO LEANO VAOVASA AND $1,750.00 TO LEGA NIMUELELEGA. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
